case_title: SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC. VS. MARTIN LAEUCHLI

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $643.69 FILED BY SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LAEUCHLI, MARTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LAEUCHLI, MARTIN
ORDER CASE CONTINUED DEFENDANT WILL NOT ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-08-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SERINA CALHOUN (OWNER) AND BETHANY DIEHL (OFFICE MANAGER). DEFENDANT MARTIN LAEUCHLI IS PRESENT. PARTIES TO UPDATE THE COURT REGARDING ARBITRATION/MEDIATION STATUS AT THE NEXT HEARING. IF NO EFFORT IS MADE REGARDING ARBITRATION, JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. COURT GRANTS ZOOM APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT MARTIN LAEUCHLI. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-04-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **SEE SIGNATURE/RECD BY LINE** SERVED JUL-25-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAEUCHLI, MARTIN
ORDER CONTINUANCE ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SERINA CALHOUN, OWNER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT LAEUCHLI, MARTIN
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL DEFENDANT APPROVED**
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BETHANY DIEHL, OFFICE MANAGER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2022 - CONTINUED TO JAN-06-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT WILL NOT ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF SYNCOPATED ARCHITECTURE, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SERINA CALHOUN (OWNER) AND BETHANY DIEHL (OFFICE MANAGER). DEFENDANT MARTIN LAEUCHLI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF UPDATED REGARDING OF ARBITRATION/ MEDIATION THAT THEY HAVE TRIED TO SCHEDULE BUT THERE IS NO AVAILABLITY UNTIL CHRISTMAS SO IT HAS NOT BEEN SCHEDULED. DEFENDANT ORALLY STATED HE WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM AND STATED ONLY UNLESS JUDGE PRO TEM WILL HEAR HIS PETITION REGARDING OF JURIDISCTION AND ADDRESS IT FIRST. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF APR-04-2023 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
